sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2619" key="a)i/+os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀΐος</orth>, <sense id="n2619.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αἰών</ref></xr>, Stes.in Cod.Bodl.Auct.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11(11)f</biblScope></bibl>.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">90</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
